about.bio: I design products that feel as good as they look. With 6 years crafting interfaces for startups and global brands, I bring together visual rigour and human empathy to create experiences people actually enjoy using. Currently available for select projects.

experience.description: Leading end-to-end product design for enterprise SaaS clients. Built a design system adopted across 4 product lines, reducing handoff time by 60%.
Designed mobile-first interfaces for fintech and health-tech clients. Increased user retention by 34% through a data-driven UX overhaul of a flagship app.
Crafted brand identities, editorial layouts, and campaign visuals for luxury and cultural clients across Europe and the Middle East.

projects.name: Aurore — Brand Identity
projects.description: Complete brand identity for a Paris-based fragrance house. Wordmark, packaging system, and retail environment spanning 12 touchpoints.

projects.name: Pulse — Health App
projects.description: End-to-end UX design for a preventive health app. Research, wireframes, high-fidelity UI, and a component library handed off to engineering.

projects.name: Meridian — Design System
projects.description: Scalable design system built for a Series B SaaS platform — 200+ components, dark and light modes, and thorough documentation for a 12-person engineering team.

projects.name: Wandr — Travel Editorial
projects.description: Interactive digital magazine concept exploring immersive editorial design with scroll-driven animations, custom typography, and full-bleed photography.
